completed_gates.evidence: ESIN_strengthened_v1.pdf compiled to 13 pages; latest log scan found no undefined references or LaTeX fatal errors.
egms_boundary_control_cyprus_v1/egms_benchmark_closure_thresholds_v1.csv reports 17,340 valid EGMS/GHSL point overlays and 65 strong points at 5 mm/yr.
egms_boundary_control_cyprus_regression_v1 reproduces the Cyprus threshold values after input-reader broadening.
egms_input_compatibility_selftest_v1 accepts csv, csv.gz, parquet and pq with variant EGMS-style column names.
regional_non_egms_strengthening_v1.csv separates Po, Chao Phraya, Brantas, Rhone and Rhine evidence roles without overclaiming EGMS validation.

NO_EGMS_CREDENTIAL_SUBMISSION_ROUTE_20260719.md and revised manuscript text use DWR/TRE positive control, Cyprus EGMS boundary control and Po sparse geodetic context instead of claiming Po/Rhone EGMS completion.
